title: eragrostis microcarpa
intro: Eragrostis microcarpa, also known as false top, is a species of grass native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
